ab: Basaw , wada ku smhungi madas ppatas da, tduwa su kbarux knan hug?
ch: W:Basaw，我忘了帶筆，你可以借我嗎?
en: Basaw, I forgot to bring my pen. Can you lend me one?

ab: Ini ku adas uri, nPitay ka nii.
en: I don’t have one either. This is Pitay’s.

ab: Kbrxun mu han hug? Uxay mu biyaw hadun?
ch: W:借我一下嗎?我很快就送還。
en: Can you lend me the pen for a second? I will return to you immediately.

ab: Iq wa! Ngali.
en: Sure, take it.

ab: Mhuway su! Jiyagi ku rmngaw mhuway su ksa ka Pitay uri ha.
en: Thank you and thank Pitay for me.

ab: Manu hug?
en: May I help you?

ab: Miyah ku mhaduc dha patas nii.
en: I want to return these two books.

ab: Ena! Manu na hug?
en: No problem and what else do you need?

ab: Pkbarux ku tru patas nii na.
en: I would like to borrow these three books.

ab: Kiya da! Iya shngii ktru jiyax do haji duri.
ch: A:好了！記得三天後要拿來還。
en: Sure and remember to return them after three days.

ab: Ini su bqani knan ka knbrxan su ssrus na.
en: You haven’t returned me the eraser.

ab: Wada mu hadun shiga da.
en: I returned it yesterday.

ab: Ma ungac qtaan ka ssrus mu da.
ch: M:那我的橡皮擦怎麼不見了。
en: Then, why is my eraser missing?

ab: Ya su wada kbrxun Basaw da.
en: Did you lend it to Basaw?

ab: Ini ku kla. Saun mu smiling binaw.
en: I don’t know. I will go and ask her.

ab: Kbrxi isu ka ssrus mu han.
en: I will lend you my eraser first.

ab: Pitay, ya Basaw ka knbarux sunan wagi nii?
en: Pitay, did Basaw lend you this coat?

ab: Uxay! Bnarig bubu mu sbgay na knan ka nii.
ch: W:不是！這是我媽媽買給我的
en: No, my mom bought it for me.

ab: Mtna qtaan ka wagi Basaw nii.
en: Basaw ’s coat is the same as yours.

ab: Mqalux ka wagi niya, ini ktna ka rakaw nami.
ch: W:他的外套是黑色的，我們的顏色不一樣。
en: His coat is black, so our colors are different.

ab: Pitay, knbarux su pila Basaw hug?
en: Pitay, did you borrow money from Basaw?

ab: Iq! Iyux mu bqanun jiyax sayang, wada ku smhungi madas pila da.
ch: W:有！我本來今天要還，我忘記帶錢了。
en: Yes, I was supposed to return to him today, but I forgot to bring the money.

ab: Saw kiya do bqanun su knuwan da?
en: Then, when will you return the money?

ab: Bqanun mu kusun da.
en: I will return to him tomorrow.

ab: Ena! Jiyagun misu rmngaw ka Basaw.
en: Okay, I will tell Basaw for you.
